metadata.page_title: Elysian Drop Troop Army List V4.3.2

special_rules.name: Commissars
special_rules.text: You may include 1 Commissar for every 500 points. The first must join the Regimental HQ Company. Commissars cannot join the Grey Ghosts. Any that does tend to die from mysterious accidents. Once all core formations have a Commissar, support formations may have a Commissar allocated to them.

special_rules.name: Drop Troops
special_rules.text: Any Elysian unit with this rule arrives via Grav Chutes using Planetfall rules. Air Cav Response Platoons do not benefit from this rule.

special_rules.name: Iron Discipline
special_rules.text: All Elysian units, excluding Imperial Navy and allies, do not incur a -1 while rallying if an enemy is within 30cm.

special_rules.name: Masters of Stealth
special_rules.text: Grey Ghosts add 1 to their cover save, gain First Strike in engagements, have Scout and Sniper, can call in artillery strikes, and are limited to one formation.

special_rules.name: Limited Garrisons
special_rules.text: Only Elysian Drop Scout Sentinels and Grey Ghosts may garrison.

profiles.name: Elysian Drop Hardened Veterans
parse_warnings: The source folds 'Las Carbines and Machetes' across two lines; this was normalized into separate Las Carbines and Machetes weapon entries.

profiles.name: Grey Ghosts
abilities_or_notes: Masters of Stealth (+1 to their cover save)
parse_warnings: The source OCR read the speed as 'I5cm'; this was normalized to '15cm'.
The source folds 'LasCarbines & Machetes' across two lines; this was normalized into separate Las Carbines and Machetes weapon entries.

profiles.name: Elysian Mortar Squad
abilities_or_notes: No minimum or double range for Indirect

profiles.name: Elysian Cyclops
abilities_or_notes: Removed from play after it attacks

profiles.name: Taurus Venator
parse_warnings: The source prints 'Multi-Laser or TLLascannon'; 'TLLascannon' was normalized to 'TL Lascannon' and preserved as an alternative weapon option.

profiles.name: Elysian Drop Rocket Sentinel
abilities_or_notes: No minimum or double range for Indirect

profiles.name: Elysian Drop Sentinel
parse_warnings: The source prints 'Small Arms and Multi-Melta' across one collapsed weapon label; this was normalized into separate Small Arms and Multi-Melta entries.

profiles.name: Elysian Sabre Platform
parse_warnings: The source concatenates 'Drop troops.Walker' in the notes; this was normalized into separate Drop Troops and Walker abilities.

profiles.name: Vulture Gunship
parse_warnings: The source prints the TL Punisher Cannon as a replacement option for the TL Autocannon and 2x Hellstrike Missiles; this was preserved as an alternative weapon package rather than simultaneous weapons.

profiles.name: Leman Russ Conqueror
parse_warnings: The source prints 'Reinforce Armour'; this was normalized to 'Reinforced Armour'.

profiles.name: IG Infantry unit
abilities_or_notes: Every second unit has an Autocannon

profiles.name: Lunar Class Cruiser
parse_warnings: The source OCR reads the Pin Point Attack firepower as 'MN 2+ TK (D3)'; this was normalized to 'MW2+ TK(D3)' because the visible row is clearly a macro-weapon pin-point attack.

profiles.name: Marauder Destroyer
parse_warnings: The source prints the Underwing Rockets note as 'FxR'; this uncommon fire arc token was preserved verbatim.

profiles.name: Vendetta
abilities_or_notes: May transport two Infantry units (Ogryns count as two units) or one Sentinel of any type.
profiles.source_section: Mobile Forces of Catachan Forces (reused from war/source-json/mobile-catachans.json)

profiles.name: Valkyrie Sky Talon
abilities_or_notes: May transport two Sentinels of any type.
profiles.source_section: Mobile Forces of Catachan Forces (reused from war/source-json/mobile-catachans.json)

army_notes.name: Design Notes
army_notes.text: Elysian drop army is a lightly armed fast assault drop army. The core of the army is deployed via grav chutes (Hi/Low) from Valkyries, while a reactionary force of reserves follow up supported directly by their Valkyrie transported troops, Vultures, Sentinels, Taurus/Tauros and Venators. Aircraft provide top cover and strafing runs.

army_notes.name: Army Weaknesses
army_notes.text: The army has almost nothing in the way of MW, and none of it ranged. It has no TK unless it takes a space ship, no War Engines, limited artillery, and most of the force is unarmoured or lightly armoured. It relies on the initial hammer blow of its grav assault.

army_notes.name: Support Formation Limit
army_notes.text: Up to 0-3 Elysian Drop Support Platoons/Squadrons may be taken per Drop Company.

army_notes.name: Upgrade Limits
army_notes.text: Drop Troop Company upgrades may be taken only once.

army_notes.name: Allies Limit
army_notes.text: Up to 1/3 of army points may be spent on Elysian Air and Allied units.

army_notes.name: Units of Note - Grey Ghosts
army_notes.text: These troops make Catachans look bad. They are supplied with heat dissipating ghillie suits camouflaged to suit the local terrain. They can move through the densest terrain without any noise, all comms are quiet, they can live off the land, they are masters of ambush and booby traps, and each squad has a medic, sniper, sergeant or corporal, and signaller, with cross training across the squad. They carry AP and AT mines and are usually sent ahead of a proposed drop assault by a couple days up to a week to gather information and target key personnel or objectives.

army_notes.name: Units of Note - Rocket Sentinels
army_notes.text: Apart from the medium mortars and limited called-in artillery fire from the Grey Ghosts, Elysians rely on mobile Rocket Sentinels for mid-ranged disrupt support fire. Even though they are vulnerable, they can be dropped in close to where they are needed.

army_notes.name: Units of Note - Elysian Hardened Veterans
army_notes.text: These grizzled and surly veterans of many campaigns have slowly upgraded their weapons loadout to suit their desire to close with the enemy. Each squad has the standard issue plasma gun, but they have replaced their lasrifles with easier to carry lascarbines and carry machetes or other large blades. They have spent a lot of time developing their close combat skills, and when they get a little older and more experienced, they become platoon sergeants.

extraction_warnings: Source extracted from local PDFs via pypdf layout extraction: C:/Users/fliff/Downloads/Elysian Drop Troop Regiment Army List V4.3.2.pdf and C:/Users/fliff/Downloads/Elysian Drop Army Unit Statistic ver 4.3.2.pdf.
source_url was left null because no reliable Elysian Drop Troop Regiment source URL was confirmed from the repository during this task.

No distinct 'Elysian Special Weapons Troops' profile was found in the statistics PDF; the formation term will need later aliasing to 'Elysian Drop Troop Infantry' unless another repo source is chosen.
The army list uses 'Tauros' and 'Venator' while the statistics PDF prints the profiles as 'Taurus' and 'Taurus Venator'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Drop Troops' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'Elysian Drop Troop Infantry'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Drop Fire Support' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'Elysian Support Squad'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Valkyries' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'Elysian Valkyrie Transport'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Vultures' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'Vulture Gunship'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Space Ship' and 'Lunar Cruiser' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'Lunar Class Cruiser'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Imperial infantry units' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'IG Infantry unit'; later wiring will need aliases.
The army list uses 'Conquerors' while the statistics PDF prints the profile as 'Leman Russ Conqueror'; later wiring will need aliases.
The statistics PDF does not include a Vendetta profile; 'Vendetta' was reused from war/source-json/mobile-catachans.json.
The statistics PDF does not include a Sky Talon profile; 'Valkyrie Sky Talon' was reused from war/source-json/mobile-catachans.json.

Obvious OCR and formatting issues were normalized conservatively: 'I5cm' -> '15cm', 'TLLascannon' -> 'TL Lascannon', 'IND' -> 'Indirect', 'OS' -> 'One Shot', and the Lunar Class Cruiser pin-point attack OCR 'MN 2+' was normalized to 'MW2+' with a profile parse warning.
